creator: freebsd@geoffgarside.co.uk
text:
What would be required to make one the slave port of the other? It would probably make sense as I think they use the same distfiles as the terminus is basically extracted from the sources of puppetdb.

Generally I tend to submit patches for both at the same time if I'm updating terminus. I'm just running a poudriere testport on terminus 2.3.4 so I should be able to post a new maintainer-update for that shortly.
